# Milla Hair Studio - Enterprise Multi-Tenant Salon Management & Booking Ecosystem

> **Architecture Status:** Production-Ready / Enterprise-Grade
> **Market Valuation:** IDR 15,000,000 - Rp 25,000,000 (Custom Full-Stack Development)

## 🚀 System Overview
Milla Hair Studio is a high-performance, custom-built full-stack web application and booking SaaS engine. Built from scratch without generic templates, this system features complex relational database synchronization, real-time analytics dashboards, automated WhatsApp gateway dispatchers, and an ultra-optimized Mobile-First Progressive UX.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack & Engineering Standards
* **Frontend Architecture:** Next.js (App Router), React Server Components (RSC), Tailwind CSS (Custom Design System with Zero-Latency Mobile Viewports).
* **Backend & Database:** Node.js runtime, Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security (RLS), real-time triggers, and secure session management.
* **Integrations:** Automated Midtrans Payment Gateway protocol, Meta Graph API hooks for omnichannel marketing (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp Status integration), and dynamic Google Maps / Search Console local SEO schema injection.
* **Security & Performance:** Strict CSRF protection, server-side environment variable encapsulation, and sub-second First Contentful Paint (FCP) optimization.

---
*Confidentiality Notice: This proprietary codebase is protected under intellectual property rights of the principal software architect.*
